FGO-FGO.banter.alive.endTurnPing: Co-op hurry up end turn ping message
FGO-FGO.cardsModifierDescription: __ cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
FGO-FGO.goldMonologue: Line spoken when obtaining a large amount of gold
FGO-FGO.title: The Fgo
FGO-CHARACTER_I_D.title: The Name (Displayed in character select)
FGO-CHARACTER_I_D.name: the Name (but 'the' is lowercase, this is displayed at the top left during gameplay)
FGO-CHARACTER_I_D.text_0:
Line #1 of character select description. 
 Line 2 of character select description.
FGO-CHARACTER_I_D.text_1: Text displayed when smacking the heart. The next one is used for the Vampires event. Usually you just change the last bit.
FGO-CHARACTER_I_D.text_2:
Navigating an unlit street, you come across several hooded figures in the midst of some dark ritual. As you approach, they turn to you in eerie unison. The tallest among them bares fanged teeth and extends a long, pale hand towards you. 
 "Join us basic one, and feel the warmth of the Spire."
FGO-MASTER.text_0: You use all the Command Spells...
FGO-MASTER.text_2: Wake up from your sleep again, this time you are at the bottom of the tower.
